name: Closing Masters Garage Doors
description_short: Closing Masters Garage Doors is a credit repair provider based in North Bergen, New Jersey. Rated 4.9/5 with 313 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Closing Masters Garage Doors is a credit repair provider serving clients in North Bergen, New Jersey. With 313 Google reviews and a 4.9/5.0 rating, Closing Masters Garage Doors has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a garage builder, spring supplier, Closing Masters Garage Doors provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in North Bergen, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Closing Masters Garage Doors operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the North Bergen, New Jersey area who are considering Closing Masters Garage Doors should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
